source_text: Clients MUST NOT act upon any information found in "supported_groups" prior to successful completion of the handshake but MAY use the information learned from a successfully completed handshake to change what groups they use in their "key_share" extension in subsequent connections.
rule_statement: Clients MUST NOT act upon server's supported_groups information until the handshake has successfully completed.
applies_when: Client receives supported_groups from server in EncryptedExtensions
expected_value: information not used until handshake complete
checkability_rationale: Can verify client doesn't modify behavior based on server groups until handshake is done, but timing is subtle.
